hero.title: DIE MART
hero.tagline: Engineering the Dies That Shape India’s Jewellery
hero.beat_origin: Elyas Nagavadria began his journey in 1980. From the slums of Kurla to the workshops of Chinchani — a man who started with nothing and built everything.
hero.beat_craft: One machine. One promise. Three factories. 100+ karigars. Every die that leaves our hands carries the weight of four decades of precision.
hero.beat_die: Base plate. Cutting punch. Emboss punch. Cavity. Five components, machined to micron tolerances, assembled into one tool that stamps thousands of jewellery pieces without losing a single detail.
hero.beat_revolution: In 2022, Hussain Nagavadria established Die Mart as a brand. AI-powered catalogs. Digital tracking. The only manufacturer in the world building this future.
hero.beat_world: Die reassembled. Perfect. Ready. From Chinchani to the world — India, Middle East, Europe. Your next die starts here.

about.label: OUR STORY
about.heading: The Man Behind the Metal
about.p1: Die Mart was built by Elyas Nagavadria — a man who started with nothing. At seventeen, he left the slums of Kurla with no inheritance and no trade. He took the train to Tarapur each day, learned the secrets of jewellery die-making in the workshops of Mumbai’s Zaveri Bazaar, and built his knowledge piece by piece, machine by machine.
about.p2: For years, he personally carried finished dies from Tarapur to Mumbai by train — parcelling them to customers across the city on his word that the work would be perfect. It always was.
about.p3: Thirty years later, Die Mart operates three factories, serves customers from Tarapur to Dhanau and across India, and has a design archive of over 3,600 dies.
about.quote: “I started with nothing. I learned from the best. I built what I believed in. Every customer who trusts us — that trust is the only reward that matters.” — Elyas Nagavadria, Founder
about.closing: His son Hussain carries the business forward — bringing 3D design, AI-powered catalog systems, and a new generation’s vision to a craft his father built with his hands.

services.label: OUR CRAFT
services.heading: Three Disciplines. One Standard.
services.subheading: Every die that leaves our factory passes through three departments — each one a craft in itself.
services.wirecut_desc: Our CNC wire cut machines run around the clock — 24 hours, 7 days a week. Every die set requires three precision operations: the cutting punch, the emboss punch, and the cavity. Each programmed individually, machined to micron tolerances, verified before the next stage.
services.wirecut_tag: Specialists in bangle progressive cutting dies
services.embossing_desc: Three embossing disciplines under one roof. Hand emboss for standard designs. Engraving machine for complex work — monograms, bandhel patterns, large top designs. Laser emboss for the intricate — small, delicate patterns where only a laser has the resolution to execute the design.
services.quality_desc: Every die is physically pressed before it leaves our hands. Three gates: Chaap — the impression must be sharp and correct. Pisur — components must align with zero crush. Faat — the material must be crack-free. Any failure sends the die back. It does not leave until it passes all three.
services.quality_tag: Chaap · Pisur · Faat — three-point quality protocol

process.label: THE PROCESS
process.heading: From Order to Dispatch
process.step1_desc: Customer places the order. Design reviewed, order paper logged. Customer receives immediate WhatsApp confirmation.
process.step2_desc: Our programmer calculates precise clearance tolerances for the die. Customer approves via WhatsApp.
process.step3_desc: Customer delivers the raw material assembly. Our team confirms receipt immediately.
process.step4_desc: Three separate programs written: cutting punch, emboss punch, cavity. Every program verified before the machine runs.
process.step5_desc: Machines execute. Components machined in sequence. Die goes to embossing — hand, engraving, or laser.
process.step6_desc: Three-point quality test. Pass: dispatched with WhatsApp confirmation. Fail: repaired and re-tested. It leaves only when it is right.

products.label: WHAT WE MANUFACTURE
products.heading: Precision in Every Piece
products.subtext: We manufacture over 30 types of jewellery dies using the most advanced CNC machinery and AI-integrated systems in the industry. 25,000+ designs in archive.
products.bangle_desc: The foundation of Indian jewellery manufacturing. Precision-cut bangle dies for every diameter and pattern.
products.flower_desc: Intricate floral patterns with petal-level precision. From lotus to mogra, every bloom captured in steel.
products.thappad_desc: Clean, high-force flat dies for bold geometric patterns and statement jewellery pieces.
products.cutting_desc: Sharp-edge dies for intricate cutwork and filigree designs. Micron-level accuracy.
products.emboss_desc: Three-dimensional relief patterns that add depth and texture to every piece of jewellery.
products.custom_desc: Bring any design to life. Custom dies manufactured to your exact specifications with 7-day turnaround.

stats.heading: Built Over Decades. Measured in Millions.
stats.supporting: Every number is a customer served. Every die is a piece of jewellery brought to life.

catalog.label: OUR ARCHIVE
catalog.heading: 3,600+ Designs
catalog.body: Decades of jewellery die craftsmanship — catalogued, 3D rendered, and searchable. Every category: bangle, ring, mono, flower, thappa, and more. Browse, search by photo, and order directly.
catalog.specialist: Specialists in bangle progressive cutting dies — the most technically complex category in the trade.

contact.thank_you_message: We’ve received your inquiry. Our team will get back to you within 4 hours.
